title: Intensely Herbal Uruguayan Morcilla Bowl
description: A light and flavorful Uruguayan dish featuring morcilla, perfect for a midnight craving, made with herbal notes and served in a lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the morcilla to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the chopped parsley and oregano to the skillet and cook for 1 minute until wilted.
Deglaze the skillet with the red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Season the morcilla mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the morcilla mixture and stir to combine.
Serve the morcilla mixture in a lacquerware bowl.
Garnish with additional parsley and oregano if desired.
